strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq, with direct relevance to AI strategy
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries, demonstrating builder fluency and innovation
concerns: No explicit mention of Master's/PhD in AI-related field, a preferred qualification
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy experience (e.g., AWS/Azure/GCP product roadmap leadership)
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting customer-facing roles in Berlin-based cloud teams
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with a diverse, builder-oriented background spanning AI-agent systems, cloud tooling, and open-source platform development. His hands-on work with AI infrastructure and his entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective align strongly with the role’s need for strategic innovation and technical inspiration. While he lacks an advanced AI degree and explicit cloud product strategy experience, his demonstrable fluency in building AI-enabled systems and leading technical initiatives offsets these gaps.
